title: Minimum Cost Tree From Leaf Values
hints: Consider the final merge step. What two contiguous groups of leaves are combined last, and how does that split define the problem?
This structure suggests interval dynamic programming. Define a state for the minimum cost to merge the leaves within any contiguous subarray.
The cost of merging a range depends on the max leaf in each part. Precompute range maximums to calculate the merge cost efficiently during transitions.
